query:
SELECT 
  name,
  slug,
  CASE 
    WHEN overview IS NULL OR overview = '' THEN 'Missing'
    WHEN LENGTH(overview) < 50 THEN 'Too Short'
    ELSE 'OK'
  END as overview_quality,
  CASE 
    WHEN topThingsToDo IS NULL OR topThingsToDo = '' THEN 'Missing'
    WHEN topThingsToDo = '["Snorkeling","Diving","Beach Relaxation","Local Culture","Water Sports"]' THEN 'Generic'
    ELSE 'OK'
  END as activities_quality,
  CASE 
    WHEN nearbyAirports IS NULL OR nearbyAirports = '' THEN 'Missing'
    ELSE 'OK'
  END as airport_quality
FROM island_guides
WHERE overview IS NULL OR overview = '' 
   OR topThingsToDo = '["Snorkeling","Diving","Beach Relaxation","Local Culture","Water Sports"]'
   OR nearbyAirports IS NULL OR nearbyAirports = ''
LIMIT 20
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT 
  name,
  slug,
  CASE 
    WHEN overview IS NULL OR overview = '' THEN 'Missing'
    WHEN LENGTH(overview) < 50 THEN 'Too Short'
    ELSE 'OK'
  END as overview_quality,
  CASE 
    WHEN topThingsToDo IS NULL OR topThingsToDo = '' THEN 'Missing'
    WHEN topThingsToDo = '["Snorkeling","Diving","Beach Relaxation","Local Culture","Water Sports"]' THEN 'Generic'
    ELSE 'OK'
  END as activities_quality,
  CASE 
    WHEN nearbyAirports IS NULL OR nearbyAirports = '' THEN 'Missing'
    ELSE 'OK'
  END as airport_quality
FROM island_guides
WHERE overview IS NULL OR overview = '' 
   OR topThingsToDo = '["Snorkeling","Diving","Beach Relaxation","Local Culture","Water Sports"]'
   OR nearbyAirports IS NULL OR nearbyAirports = ''
LIMIT 20
